projectDescription: A fast Go implementation of the 64-bit xxHash algorithm (XXH64) with assembly-optimized paths for amd64 and arm64.
keyFeatures: Extremely fast 64-bit xxHash (XXH64) implementation in pure Go
Assembly-optimized implementations for amd64 and arm64 architectures
Implements the standard hash.Hash64 interface for drop-in compatibility
Zero-allocation design for both one-shot and streaming usage
Seeded hashing via NewWithSeed and ResetWithSeed
String hashing without allocation via Sum64String and WriteString
purego build tag to opt into the Go implementation on any platform
